<!-- Google tag (gtag.js)-->

```{=html}
<script async src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=G-S1L73VGCG5"></script>
```
```{=html}
<script>
  window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
  function gtag(){dataLayer.push(arguments);}
  gtag('js', new Date());

  gtag('config', 'G-S1L73VGCG5');
</script>
```
